prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `84ba50d3`.
codex_response:
Implemented `84ba50d3` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: wide `1`-objects keep their shape and move downward until their widest row sits just above the horizontal `2` bar, while one-cell-wide vertical objects drop to the bottom and leave `8` holes in the bar; if a wide object rests on the bar, that bar cell becomes `1`. The Opus hint was useful, but the Sonnet hint was discarded because it incorrectly described a vertical reflection; that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_84ba50d3/notes.md#L1).

The task code is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_84ba50d3/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_84ba50d3/verifier.py#L1), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_84ba50d3/generator.py#L1), and [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_84ba50d3/helpers.py#L1). No `dsl_ext.py` primitive was needed; the task only uses local shape-construction helpers.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the built artifacts are present at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/84ba50d3/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/84ba50d3/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/84ba50d3/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/84ba50d3/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/84ba50d3/previews/preview_03.png). Visual sanity check on the preview sheet looked on-family.
